# Span

An inline text container component. Renders a `<span>` HTML element. Useful for applying inline styles to portions of text.

## Import

```jsx
import { Span } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The inline content to render |
| `color` | `string` | - | Sets the text color |
| `fontWeight` | `string` | - | Sets the font weight |
| `fontSize` | `string` | - | Sets the font size |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>
  Total: <Span fontWeight="bold">$49.99</Span>
</Text>
```

### With color

```jsx
<Text>
  Status: <Span color="green.500">Active</Span>
</Text>
```

### Combining styles

```jsx
<Text>
  <Span color="gray.500" fontSize="sm">Last updated:</Span>{" "}
  <Span fontWeight="semibold">2 hours ago</Span>
</Text>
```

### As inline styling wrapper

```jsx
<Heading>
  Welcome to <Span color="blue.500">Our Platform</Span>
</Heading>
```

## Features

- Renders a `<span>` HTML element for inline text styling
- Supports all Chakra UI style props
- Does not break text flow (stays inline)
- Useful for styling specific words or phrases within larger text blocks
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
